generated_oml:
// C1: Acting Components
instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "ISO 23247-compliant Physical Twin Entity encapsulating sensor-actuator-specific logic (e.g., point cloud clustering, actuation FE) for 1/10th-scale autonomous vehicle"
]

instance LowerLevelChassisActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lower-level chassis component managing steering and speed control via motor and servo actuators for autonomous vehicle"
]

instance UpperLevelChassisActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Upper-level chassis hosting NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano executing actuation commands (e.g., motor voltage commands) derived from DT's ACC control logic"
]

// C2: Physical Sensing Components
instance HokuyoLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST-10LX LiDAR for 3D object detection in upper-level chassis of autonomous vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudData
]

instance IntelDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel Deepsense D435i Depth Camera for environmental perception in upper-level chassis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageData
]

instance VehicleStateSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Vehicle state sensors (speed, steering angle) embedded in chassis for autonomous vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VehicleStateData
]

// C3: Data Transmission
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelDepthCamera
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

instance ObjectTrackData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoLiDAR, IntelDepthCamera
]

instance EgoVehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleStateSensor
]

// C4: Data Storage
instance RawSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Raw sensor data streams (LiDAR point clouds, depth images, vehicle state) processed by ROS2 nodes"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudData, DepthImageData, VehicleStateData
]

instance ProcessedObjectTracks : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured object tracks (lead vehicle positions) and ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) stored in SQL database"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData, EgoVehicleStateData
]

instance ControlParameters : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Control parameters for ACC (lead vehicle distance, desired speed adjustments) derived from real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ObjectTrackData
]

// C5: Models
instance PointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN + Kalman filter model for LiDAR data segmentation and point cloud clustering"
]

instance ACCControlLogic : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "ISO 15622-compliant control logic implementing distance-based speed regulation for ACC (no road curvature)"
]

instance VisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D-rendered object tracks and ego vehicle state visualization for ROS2-based UI"
]

// C6: Enablers
instance ROS2Middleware : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS2 (Robot Operating System 2) middleware for inter-component communication and node lifecycle management"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataCollectionFeatureEngineering, DataPreProcessingFeatureEngineering, DataVisualizationFeatureEngineering, ControlPanelFeatureEngineering
]

instance JetsonOrinNano : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano microcomputer executing ACC control logic and AI/ML tasks"
    DTDFVocab:enables ACCControlLogic
]

instance JetsonNX : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "NVIDIA Jetson NX for sensor fusion processing"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataPreProcessingFeatureEngineering
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink for complex systems modeling (point cloud clustering, tracking, control logic)"
    DTDFVocab:enables PointCloudClusteringModel, ACCControlLogic
]

instance CustomDataTranslationFE : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom Data Translation Feature Engineering for message serialization, unit conversions, and alignment between entities"
]

// C7: Feature Engineering (Fixed references)
instance DataCollectionFeatureEngineering : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngineering [
    base:desc "Data Collection FE gathering object tracks (lead vehicle positions) and ego vehicle state into SQL database via ROS2 nodes"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, CustomDataTranslationFE
]

instance DataPreProcessingFeatureEngineering : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngineering [
    base:desc "Data Pre-Processing FE converting raw sensor data into structured formats for visualization and control logic"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, JetsonNX, MATLABSimulink
]

instance DataVisualizationFeatureEngineering : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngineering [
    base:desc "Visualization FE creating 3D-rendered object tracks and ego vehicle state visualization via ROS2-based UI"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationModel, ROS2Middleware
]

instance ControlPanelFeatureEngineering : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngineering [
    base:desc "Control Panel FE implementing remote management and operator control for ACC operations"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ROS2Middleware, CustomDataTranslationFE
]

instance PointCloudProcessingEngineering : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngineering [
    base:desc "Feature engineering for point cloud clustering and tracking using DBSCAN + Kalman filter"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringModel, ROS2Middleware
]

instance ACCControlEngineering : DTDFVocab:FeatureEngineering [
    base:desc "Feature engineering implementing ISO 15622-compliant ACC control logic with distance-based speed adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCControlLogic, UpperLevelChassisActuator
]

// C8: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle), detected object tracks, and projected driving paths via 3D virtual cockpit"
    DTDFVocab:provides VehicleStateMonitoringInsight, ObjectTrackMonitoringInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC control logic from onboard ECUs to cloud/edge infrastructure, reducing resource constraints on Jetson Orin Nano"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlLogicOptimizationAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operator control of ACC (enable/disable, set desired speed, emergency braking) and developer troubleshooting via Control Panel"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperatorControlAction, DeveloperTroubleshootingAction
]

// C9: Insights/Actions
instance VehicleStateMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) for ACC performance validation"
]

instance ObjectTrackMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of detected object tracks (lead vehicle trajectories) for ACC compliance validation"
]

instance ControlLogicOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Data-driven recommendations for fuel economy optimization based on real-time ACC performance"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OperatorControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote control interface for enabling/disabling ACC and setting desired speed"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance DeveloperTroubleshootingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Developer interface for remote management and troubleshooting of ACC system components"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

// C10: Environment
instance AutonomousVehicleEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains LowerLevelChassisActuator, UpperLevelChassisActuator, HokuyoLiDAR, IntelDepthCamera, VehicleStateSensor, PhysicalTwinEntity
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT sends actuation commands to the physical twin via the **Actuation FE** (ISO 23247), translating desired speed adjustments into motor voltage commands via the **Vedder Electronic Speed Controller**. Remote management commands (enable/disable ACC, emergency braking) are transmitted over Wi-Fi to the DT Entity, which forwards them to the physical twin’s control system. The **Controlling FE** implements ISO 15622’s ACC logic (distance-based speed regulation)."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates at a **real-time scale** with synchronization requirements:
  - **Data collection and processing**: ~10–50 ms per perception cycle (LiDAR depth images processed via ROS2 topics).
  - **Latency constraint**: End-to-end latency between vehicle and DT Entity ≤100 ms (aligned with 3GPP V2V communication specs).
  - **Clock synchronization**: Devices share a global time reference with ±100 ms accuracy (sufficient for distributed systems but not stricter safety-critical standards)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation consists of three primary entities (ISO 23247 framework):
  1. **Physical Twin Entity**: Hosts sensor-actuator logic (e.g., LiDAR processing, actuation FE) and deviates from ISO 23247 by including general automotive functionality (e.g., point cloud tracking).
  2. **Digital Twin Entity**: Manages data collection (Data Collecting FE), visualization (Presentation FE), and reporting (Reporting FE). Offloads compute-intensive tasks (e.g., ACC logic) to cloud/edge.
  3. **User Entity**: Provides 3D Visualization (User Interface FE) and Control Panel (User Interface FE) for remote management. The **Data Translation FE** bridges inter-entity communication via Wi-Fi."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT spans **design, development, and operation** phases:
  - **Design**: Used as a cyber-physical experimentation platform for ACC validation (simulated driving paths, compliance checks).
  - **Development**: Enables remote testing and troubleshooting via data monitoring/reporting.
  - **Operation**: Supports real-time monitoring, optimization (e.g., fuel economy), and predictive maintenance (e.g., brake system health). The DT covers the **as-operated** phase of the physical twin."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Verification**: ISO 15622 compliance for ACC control logic, validated via simulation (MATLAB/Simulink) and real-world testing.
  - **Validation**: Real-time monitoring of ego vehicle state (speed, steering angle) and object tracks against physical twin data.
  - **Uncertainty**: LiDAR depth camera and sensor noise are mitigated via DBSCAN clustering and Kalman filtering for track accuracy.
  - **Latency**: End-to-end latency <100 ms guarantees real-time responsiveness for ACC operations."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection employs:
  - **Network Protocols**: ROS2 (for intra-DT communication) and Wi-Fi (for inter-entity communication between vehicle and DT Entity).
  - **Latency Constraints**: ≤100 ms end-to-end latency (3GPP V2V spec compliance).
  - **Clock Synchronization**: ±100 ms accuracy for distributed systems (sufficient for this use case but not stricter safety standards)."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The DT is deployed as a **cloud/edge-based system**:
  - **Physical Twin Entity**: Runs on-board (Jetson Orin Nano) for sensor-actuator control.
  - **Digital Twin Entity**: Hosted externally (cloud/edge) for compute-intensive tasks (e.g., ACC logic).
  - **User Entity**: Accessible via web-based UI (3D Visualization, Control Panel) over Wi-Fi."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Horizontal integration occurs with:
  - **External Systems**: Data exchange with other DTs or IoT platforms via standardized protocols (e.g., OPC UA for data translation)."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Not explicitly detailed in the documents regarding data ownership or privacy policies."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT adheres to:
  - **ISO Standards**:
    - ISO 23247 (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework, adapted for automotive via entity-based RA).
    - ISO 15622 (ADAS performance requirements for ACC).
    - ISO/IEC 30173 (Digital Twin – Concepts and Terminology).
  - **Protocols**:
    - ROS2 (Robot Operating System 2) for middleware.
    - Wi-Fi for inter-entity communication."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety and security are addressed via:
  - **Safety**: ISO 15622 compliance for ACC (performance class I), real-time latency constraints (<100 ms), and clock synchronization (±100 ms). Remote operations are enabled but do not guarantee human-in-the-loop safety (e.g., emergency braking commands may trigger physical accidents)."
]
